title: PBYI or TECH: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Medical - Biomedical and Genetics sector might want to consider either Puma Biotech (PBYI) or Techne (TECH). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?

title: Santa Claus is coming to town and bringing presents for your stock portfolio
text: The stock market, as measured by the S&P 500 Index SPX, continued to move higher and deeper into overbought territory. A price was paid for that on December 20, when a small amount of selling turned into an avalanche, costing the benchmark U.S. index more than 70 points in just a couple of hours of trading.

title: BIO-TECHNE TO PRESENT AT THE 42nd ANNUAL J.P. MORGAN HEALTHCARE CONFERENCE
text: MINNEAPOLIS , Dec. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) today announced that Kim Kelderman, current Chief Operating Officer, and Chief Executive Officer effective February 1, 2024, will present at the 42nd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Wednesday, January 10, 2024, at 9:00 a.m.

title: BIO-TECHNE ANNOUNCES SUBMISSION OF FDA DRUG MASTER FILE FOR EXCELLERATE GMP IPSC EXPANSION MEDIUM SUPPORTING STEM CELL THERAPY
text: MINNEAPOLIS , Dec. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) today announced that it has filed a Drug Master File (DMF) with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for its ExCellerate™ GMP iPSC Expansion Medium, Animal Free (CCM0036-GMP), supporting the development and manufacture of regenerative medicine and stem cell therapies. ExCellerate GMP iPSC Expansion Medium is optimized to support robust expansion and maintenance of stem cell culture for enhanced consistency and reproducibility throughout the stem cell manufacturing process.

title: LUNAPHORE AND SIB AWARDED INNOSUISSE FUNDING TO DEVELOP INNOVATIVE AI-BASED ASSAY DEVELOPMENT TOOLS
text: MINNEAPOLIS , Dec. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) today announced that Lunaphore, a Bio-Techne brand, and SIB Swiss Institute of Bioinformatics, have been awarded Innosuisse funding for an innovation project. The collaboration aims to develop novel AI-based assay development tools for spatial biology on Lunaphore's COMET™ to further accelerate the adoption of multiplex sequential immunofluorescence (seqIF™) technology in research.

title: PBYI or TECH: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors interested in Medical - Biomedical and Genetics stocks are likely familiar with Puma Biotech (PBYI) and Techne (TECH). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?
